evaluation_method: LOSO SVM (leave-one-subject-out on hybrid features); deployment bundle fits scaler+SVM per held-out subject
metadata_note: training_accuracy is pooled LOSO accuracy (each sample classified by the pipeline trained without that subject). loso_mean_fold_accuracy is the mean of per-subject fold accuracies from training run real_data_model_20260414_085233. UAR and per-class recall are from the same pooled LOSO prediction pass on 254 CASME-II samples (data/casme2 + casme2_labels.csv).
